step_by_step_thinking:
\boxed{B}
**Clinical Reasoning:** While sulindac has shown modest effectiveness in reducing adenoma burden and size in FAP patients—by approximately 50% and 65%, respectively—it does not halt progression indefinitely; adenomas recur after discontinuation. Similarly, eflornithine is not mentioned in any of the referenced sources regarding its use or effects in FAP. Therefore, neither agent demonstrates proven sustained efficacy for preventing progression.
